# claudeplatform_organization (Data Source)

The organization the configured credential belongs to (GET /v1/organizations/me).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Organization UUID.
- `name` (String) Organization name.
